title: [Tartifacts, Balcony]
description: Silver tables and chairs line this balcony, resting on a floor covered with a fine layer of tart crumbs.  A group of dwarves sits at an end table, grumbling about the lack of good ale in Icemule Trace.

wayto.3610: ;e table = "Flying Tart"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
